items.title: Monarch: Legacy of Monsters
items.description: After surviving Godzilla’s attack on San Francisco, Cate is shaken yet again by a shocking secret. Amid monstrous threats, she embarks on a globetrotting adventure to learn the truth about her family—and the mysterious organization known as Monarch.

items.title: Terrifying Miracles
items.description: Shaw finds an unlikely ally within Monarch as the team has a harrowing run-in. Keiko and Lee grow closer while at a military ball.

items.ariaLabel: Will the Real May Please Stand Up?

contextAction.title: Will the Real May Please Stand Up?

items.title: Will the Real May Please Stand Up?
items.description: May finally faces her past. Duvall and Shaw follow traces of Godzilla and Hiroshi.

fields.name: Will the Real May Please Stand Up?

location.name: Will the Real May Please Stand Up?

items.title: Birthright
items.description: The team goes back to where things all began to confront Shaw. On the brink of collapse, Monarch takes drastic measures.

items.title: Axis Mundi
items.description: Shaw and May search for Cate and make a startling discovery. Kentaro struggles with his loss.

items.title: Beyond Logic
items.description: Season finale. The team struggles to find a way out of Axis Mundi. Kentaro and Tim make an unexpected alliance.

items.title: Cause and Effect
items.description: Decades after being presumed dead, Keiko’s return shocks Monarch. Cate defies orders to save Shaw—and unleashes a terrifying new Titan.

items.title: Resonance
items.description: Lee and Keiko investigate a secretive village with a cult devoted to a mysterious creature. Cate crosses paths with a deadly stowaway.

items.title: Secrets
items.description: Shaw, Keiko, Hiroshi, and Kentaro go rogue in an attempt to find Titan X. Cate struggles with feelings of guilt. A buried secret is exposed.

items.title: Trespass
items.description: To get Hiroshi’s device back, Shaw and the team execute a daring heist at Apex Cybernetics.

items.title: Furusato
items.description: In Santa Soledad, Titan X becomes a target for Apex, forcing Shaw and the Randas to infiltrate the covert experiment.

items.title: Requiem
items.description: Shaw and Suzuki test a “Titan phone” designed to summon Godzilla, triggering an unforeseen event that puts Shaw in the path of his own past.
